query:
-- Check all SasBoss Collaboration services
SELECT externalId, planName, provider, monthlyCost, monthlyRevenue, customerExternalId
FROM services
WHERE provider = 'SasBoss' AND planName LIKE '%Collaboration%'
ORDER BY monthlyCost DESC;

-- Also check all SasBoss services with plan name 'Collaboration' specifically
SELECT externalId, planName, provider, monthlyCost, monthlyRevenue
FROM services
WHERE planName = 'Collaboration'
ORDER BY monthlyCost DESC;

-- Check S1123 details
SELECT s.externalId, s.planName, s.provider, s.monthlyCost, s.monthlyRevenue, c.name as customerName
FROM services s
JOIN customers c ON c.externalId = s.customerExternalId
WHERE s.externalId = 'S1123';
